data.title: Record $15 billion spent on full-size pickup trucks in December as new-vehicle prices hit new high, average transaction price at all-time peak.
data.description: In December 2025, the average transaction price (ATP) for a new vehicle reached a record high, as reported by Kelley Blue Book, a Cox Automotive brand. This increase was driven by a notable selection of midsize SUVs and full-size pickup trucks.

data.title: Government offers 10% additional issuance of RIKB 38 0215 and RIKS 29 0917, at bids' prices.
data.description: During the Treasury bond auction on January 9th, the Government Debt Management offered a quantity equal to 10% of the nominal value for sale. This was done at the price of the winning bids as stipulated in the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds.

data.title: Sirvoy introduces forever free plan, Sirvoy Free, for solo hosts and single unit stays worldwide.
data.description: In HJO, Sweden, on January 13, 2026, Sirvoy, a renowned hospitality management platform used by small accommodation businesses globally, unveiled Sirvoy Free. This new plan is designed for solo hosts and single unit properties like small vacation rentals, offering a forever free option. This initiative aims to cater to the needs of such individuals and properties at no cost.

data.title: Product Genius AI introduces Large Interaction Models (LIMs) for e-commerce websites, showing 36% revenue increase.
data.description: In New York, Product Genius AI disclosed their latest innovation, Large Interaction Models (LIMs), designed for e-commerce platforms. Unveiled at Google’s Booth during the National Retail Federation 2026 (NRF 2026), the presentation showcased outcomes of A/B testing. The results indicated a substantial 36% average increase in revenue compared to the current websites of participating brands. This test encompassed millions of online shoppers in the United States, representing 25 renowned brands including Betsey Johnson.

data.title: Amtrak Pacific Surfliner adds daily roundtrip between San Diego and Los Angeles, increasing frequency along the coast.
data.description: Increased service and improved schedule are boosting Pacific Surfliner frequency along the Southern California coastline. Commuters in 2025 spent significantly more time traveling to work compared to the two previous years. This expansion comes at an opportune moment for Southern Californians...

data.title: Inflation remains steady as CPI rises by 2.7% YoY in December. Housing, food, and utilities costs rise, with a 20% spike in video game subscriptions.
data.description: In December, the Consumer Price Index (CPI) rose 2.7% year over year, remaining stable from November. Core CPI, excluding food and energy, rose 2.6% year over year. Prices increased 0.3% month over month, with Core CPI rising 0.2%. Housing, food, and utilities costs continued to rise significantly, impacting household budgets. Some categories saw notable increases, such as a nearly 20% surge in subscription and rental of video and video games. The report suggests ongoing pressure on consumer budgets despite overall stable inflation.

data.title: WIF price predicted to hit $0.42 resistance by end of January. Short-term target is $0.35-$0.44. Key support at $0.35.
data.description: A prediction summary for WIF price indicates a short-term target of $0.42 within a week. The medium-term forecast ranges from $0.35 to $0.44 in a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated at $0.42, while critical support levels are seen at $0.35. Market analysis suggests potential fluctuations in WIF value within these specified ranges.

data.title: ArisGlobal shows strong growth with 100+ new customers, 34 go-lives, and rapid AI adoption in 2025.
data.description: ArisGlobal, a leading AI-first technology company in the life sciences sector and the creator of LifeSphere®, has recently seen significant growth with over 100 new and expanded customers for their platform. The company has successfully launched LifeSphere in 34 countries worldwide, demonstrating strong global adoption. The rapid enterprise implementation of their NavaX technology further underscores this momentum. These developments mark a successful start for ArisGlobal in 2026.

data.title: Nexo partners with U.S. ATP 500 Dallas Open in a multi-year deal starting in 2026, resurfaces two public tennis courts.
data.description: Frisco, Texas - Nexo, the digital assets wealth platform, has secured the title partnership for the U.S. ATP 500 Dallas Open starting in 2026, marking the first-ever partnership of its kind. The multi-year agreement is part of Nexo's strategy to enhance its brand presence through prominent global sports events. The announcement was made in Dallas, coinciding with the introduction of the Nexo Dallas Open brand and the refurbishment of two public tennis courts in North Texas. The Dallas Open is one of just two ATP 500 tournaments in the United States, solidifying Nexo's commitment to the sporting world.

data.title: Predictive Clinical Biomarkers Market expected to reach $14.69 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 11.6% from $8.49 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals significant growth projections for the Predictive Clinical Biomarkers Market. The market is expected to increase from approximately USD 8.49 billion in 2025 to USD 14.69 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.6%. The report includes analysis across 708 market data tables and 56 figures, showcasing key insights into this expanding sector.

data.title: Inventor from Newport improves walker design, introduces SAFE WALKER with larger wheels for ease on rough terrain.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Newport, Tennessee, discussed the creation of the SAFE WALKER. The traditional walker with small wheels often requires the user to exert force when navigating rough surfaces. This innovative design aims to address this issue by offering a smoother experience for users, particularly on uneven terrains. The inventor highlighted the need for improved mobility aids and sought to enhance the ease of use for individuals relying on walkers. The SAFE WALKER introduces a new approach to mobility assistance, incorporating an enhanced design to facilitate movement and ensure stability. The invention represents a significant advancement in the field of mobility aids, potentially benefiting a large number of individuals seeking a more efficient and reliable walking assistant.

data.title: Stuart Weitzman expands "Stuart Weitzman New York" with new men's campaign, focusing on elevated loafers & lace-ups. (Characters: 107)
data.description: In its dedication to New York City, a new campaign highlights Stuart Weitzman's collection of premium loafers and lace-ups tailored for urban professionals. The campaign, launched on Jan. 13, 2026, underscores the brand's commitment to high-quality footwear. Stuart Weitzman, a major player under Caleres (NYSE: CAL), continues to impress with its luxurious offerings for the modern metropolitan man.

data.title: Ontario names Crawford Nickel Project under One Project, One Process framework by Canada Nickel Company Inc. TSXV: CNC.
data.description: In Toronto on January 13, 2026, Canada Nickel Company Inc. (TSXV: CNC, OTCQB: CNIKF) shared that the Province of Ontario has officially designated the Crawford Nickel Project as the second endeavor to be progressed.
